titles.title: There Is Something That Makes Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is something that makes me come into your presence, my Saviour There is something that makes me come into your presence, my Saviour There is something that makes me come into your presence, my Saviour

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are my Saviour oh, my Saviour You are my Saviour oh, my Saviour There is something that makes me come into your presence, my Saviour

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is something that makes me come into your presence, my (Healer) There is something that makes me come into your presence, my (Redeemer) There is something that makes me come into your presence, my (Lover)
